description_long: This kiosk features a tall, cylindrical structure with a flat top and a recessed front section. The front face includes a prominent rectangular blue display or screen above a dark opening, likely for transactions or interactions. Below the opening, there is a circular marking on a ledge, possibly indicating a touchpoint or sensor area. The sides and rear are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist design. The kiosk is constructed from a light beige material, giving it a clean and modern appearance. Its overall form is streamlined, with no visible doors or windows, and the signage is integrated into the front panel.
description: A tall, cylindrical beige kiosk with a recessed front featuring a blue display and a dark transaction opening, designed in a minimalist modern style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue display, dark opening, and circular marking on the ledge.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the recessed front and the smooth, unadorned side surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a completely smooth, featureless cylindrical surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the recessed front and smooth side.
attribute_signage_type: digital display integrated into the front panel; no visible text or symbols
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, seamless with the cylindrical body, no overhangs or decorative elements
